Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION when followed by Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER versus when followed by Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Total time spent in Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION across all variants that include a rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs

Name: Minimum time between Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE and Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that later result in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Average duration of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION compared to the duration of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in successful (non-rejected) paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER in variants where rejection occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to be performed after Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in cases that avoid any rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that proceed directly to Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR without intermediate approvers
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER in successful paths versus paths ending in Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION grouped by case:BudgetNumber to identify budget-related delays preceding rejections by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that eventually loop back due to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in variants that include Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION prior to reaching PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and the end of the case

Name: Total time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Payment Handled in variants that never involve PRE_APPROVER versus those that do and end in rejection
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER, where such transition exists
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration FOR_APPROVAL by PRE_APPROVER'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION in cases that are resubmitted after Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER compared to first-time approvals
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and the end of case where activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER occurs
